lines: The FIFA World Cup is underway here in the U.S., with the national team playing a match today.
The Indiana Fever dropped 113-96 to the Atlanta Dream yesterday, moving to 9-7 and sitting third in the Eastern Conference; they’ll host the Phoenix Mercury at 8 PM tomorrow.
The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 7-4 yesterday, keeping their record at 30-44.
escape_hatch: you follow this way closer than I do.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Sunday, June 21. The FIFA World Cup is underway here in the U.S., with the national team playing a match today. The Indiana Fever dropped 113-96 to the Atlanta Dream yesterday, moving to 9-7 and sitting third in the Eastern Conference; they’ll host the Phoenix Mercury at 8 PM tomorrow. The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 7-4 yesterday, keeping their record at 30-44. And if it gets away from you, your out is: you follow this way closer than I do.
